column1: # sheet.fn.info.sheets golden corpus (spec §7, §11; Microsoft SHEETS docs).
# SHEETS([reference]) is the number of sheets a reference spans. T1 LIMITATION:
# always 1. The calling convention has no 3-D-range Arg shape (a range is always
# one contiguous window on one sheet), and the pure EvalCtx carries no workbook
# sheet count, so a no-argument call cannot return the workbook total either.
# Both cases are ruled 1 at T1 (additive EvalCtx::sheet_count + a 3-D Arg variant
# is the honest fix, flagged in the track report).
